# openzigs-social — Copilot instructions

openzigs-social is a focused, agentic, local-first social media manager built on the `@github/copilot-sdk` agent runtime. Stack: Node 22 + TypeScript ESM + pnpm workspace, Express 5 + Socket.IO + better-sqlite3 on the server; Next.js 14 (App Router) + React 19 + Tailwind v4 + Radix UI / shadcn in `ui/`. Default LLM is local Gemma 4 via Ollama; BYOK for OpenAI / Anthropic / OpenAI-compatible providers. Telegram (`grammy`) is the only push-notification + remote-control channel. Persistence is SQLite at `~/.openzigs-social/openzigs-social.db`. Credentials live at `~/.openzigs-social/auth.json` (0o600). Quality gate before any commit or PR: `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && (cd ui && pnpm lint && pnpm build)`. If `graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md` exists, read it before any wide grep — it is a precomputed knowledge graph of the codebase.
